footer.reserveYourStay: Reserve your stay at Het Orvelter Hof
footer.enjoyTogether: Enjoy peace, space and comfort together in the heart of Drenthe.

intro.title: A place where groups feel at home
intro.text1: Orvelter Hof is a charming group accommodation for 2 to 36 guests, located in the peaceful Drenthe village of Witteveen. The former farmhouse has been lovingly converted into a comfortable retreat where every detail has been considered.
intro.text2: With luxury bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, cosy communal spaces, a bar and a beautiful outdoor area with playground, Orvelter Hof is the perfect place to come together.
intro.text3: Whether you're planning a family weekend, a bachelor party, a team building event or a business retreat — you'll find the space, tranquillity and all the facilities for an unforgettable stay.
intro.text4: All 17 bedrooms feature en-suite bathrooms and comfortable box-spring beds. The accommodation is exclusively for your group — no other guests.

facilities.title: Rooms & facilities
facilities.description: Orvelter Hof offers 17 luxury double rooms with en-suite bathrooms, a professional kitchen, conference rooms, a cosy bar and a beautiful outdoor area. Everything for a carefree stay.
facilities.barText: A welcoming bar with a draught beer system and lounge area for relaxed evenings together.
facilities.gardenText: Spacious fenced garden with terrace, BBQ area, playground and bouncy castle.

catering.title:
Enjoy together,
without worries
catering.quoteText1: Want to make things easy during your stay? We offer various buffet and catering options so you can fully enjoy yourself without having to cook.
catering.quoteText2: From breakfast to barbecue: everything can be arranged for you.

showcase.title: Discover the most beautiful spots in Drenthe
showcase.description: From vast forests and ancient dolmens to charming villages and active excursions — there's something for everyone.

packages.title: Meetings in the green
packages.description: Away from the daily hustle, surrounded by Drenthe's nature. Our business packages are fully arranged so you can focus on what matters.
packages.pkg1Desc: Perfect for a short, intensive meeting or workshop
packages.pkg2Desc: For productive morning or afternoon sessions with lunch
packages.pkg3Desc: Fully organised day including lunch & refreshments
packages.pkg4Desc: Extended day programme with lunch and 3-course dinner
packages.pkg5Desc: Including overnight stay for an intensive retreat or training
packages.pkg6Desc: Multi-day event with full service and overnight stay
packages.feat_cake: Victoria cake or Drenthe Heath cake

kamers.heroSubtitle: Luxury double rooms with en-suite bathrooms, box-spring beds and all the facilities for a carefree stay.
kamers.roomsText: During your stay you will have access to 17 luxuriously appointed double rooms with en-suite bathrooms. Six rooms are located on the ground floor. The remaining eleven rooms are on the first floor. You will sleep on comfortable box-spring beds.
kamers.roomFeature1: 5 double rooms on the ground floor (4 also available as family room)
kamers.roomFeature2: 11 double rooms on the first floor
kamers.roomFeature4: Private toilet, shower and washbasin per room
kamers.roomFeature5: 1 room adapted for guests with a disability
kamers.facility1: Free WiFi, including in the bedrooms
kamers.facility2: Spacious and luxury double rooms with box-spring beds
kamers.facility3: Every room equipped with private toilet, shower and washbasin
kamers.facility4: Spacious living room with large flatscreen TV and sound system
kamers.facility6: Lovely south-facing terrace and picnic tables on the lawn
kamers.accessibilityText: One double room on the ground floor is adapted for guests with a physical disability, including wheelchair-accessible bathroom facilities.
kamers.playroomText: Large play loft with table tennis, games, craft corner, TV and comfortable bean bags.
kamers.playgroundText: A beautiful playground with play equipment and a bouncy castle for the children, right next to the accommodation.

vergaderlocatie.heroSubtitle: Orvelter Hof is a rural and inspiring conference venue in the heart of Drenthe. Peace, space and a beautiful setting to hold meetings, brainstorm or stay overnight.
vergaderlocatie.uspBereikbaarText: Centrally located from Assen, Emmen and Hoogeveen
vergaderlocatie.uspRustigText: Inspiring venue surrounded by Drenthe's nature
vergaderlocatie.uspExclusiefText: No other guests, entirely for your group
vergaderlocatie.uspParkerenText: Ample parking directly at the accommodation
vergaderlocatie.uspServiceText: Attention to detail and tailored to your wishes
vergaderlocatie.introTitle: Peace and comfort for business stays
vergaderlocatie.introText: At Het Orvelter Hof, a business stay is all about peace, clarity and comfort. The accommodation offers comfortable rooms with en-suite bathrooms and facilities that contribute to a pleasant daily routine during multi-day meetings, training sessions and retreats. Everything is set up so you can work and relax undisturbed.
vergaderlocatie.featureVergaderenText: Our conference room accommodates up to 30 people and is fully equipped for your meeting.
vergaderlocatie.featureVergaderenItem1: Conference room for up to 30 people
vergaderlocatie.featureVergaderenItem2: Suitable for conferences, training and workshops
vergaderlocatie.featureVergaderenItem3: Projector and flipchart available free of charge
vergaderlocatie.featureOvernachtenText: For multi-day training, retreats or team sessions we offer 17 comfortable double rooms, all with en-suite bathrooms.
vergaderlocatie.featureOvernachtenItem2: Comfortable beds for a good night's rest
vergaderlocatie.featureOvernachtenItem4: Quiet rooms, ideal after intensive sessions
vergaderlocatie.featureOvernachtenItem6: Suitable for multi-day training and retreats
vergaderlocatie.featureFocusText: Besides the content of your meeting, the rhythm of the day is also important: space to focus, but also to recharge.
vergaderlocatie.featureFocusItem1: Room for walks and fresh outdoor air
vergaderlocatie.featureFocusItem2: Informal spots for reflection and conversation
vergaderlocatie.featureFocusItem4: Outdoor spaces for breaks between sessions
vergaderlocatie.featureFocusItem6: Ideal for strategy days and planning sessions
vergaderlocatie.ctaText: Request a no-obligation quote, or get in touch for personal advice.

teambuilding.heroSubtitle: Looking for an inspiring venue for teambuilding, training or retreats? Orvelter Hof offers peace, space and all the facilities in the heart of Drenthe's nature.
teambuilding.uspPersonenText: Suitable for small and large groups of up to 36 participants
teambuilding.uspOpMaatText: Programmes fully aligned with your goals and wishes
teambuilding.uspNatuurText: Inspiring setting for creativity and team spirit
teambuilding.uspUitgerustText: Conference room with projector, flipchart and free WiFi
teambuilding.uspCateringText: From coffee breaks to full buffets, we arrange everything
teambuilding.introTitle: Working together to build a stronger team
teambuilding.introText1: Experience excellent teambuilding and training at Orvelter Hof in Drenthe. Our group accommodation offers the ideal mix of professional facilities and relaxation in a beautiful natural setting.
teambuilding.introText2: Whether you are planning a team day, multi-day training or strategic retreat — we are happy to help you create a successful and productive stay. No other guests, the venue is exclusively for your group.
teambuilding.programTeambuildingText: Strengthen collaboration within your team with activities in the Drenthe countryside. From outdoor challenges to creative workshops — we provide a programme that connects.
teambuilding.programTeambuildingItem4: Walking and cycling tours through Drenthe
teambuilding.programTrainingenText: A quiet, inspiring setting for training and workshops. No distractions, complete focus. Our conference room provides all the facilities you need.
teambuilding.programTrainingenItem1: Conference room for up to 30 people
teambuilding.programHeisessiesText: Step out of the daily routine and focus on strategy, vision or team development. The tranquillity of Drenthe provides the perfect setting for in-depth sessions.
teambuilding.programHeisessiesItem4: Nature as a backdrop for breaks
teambuilding.ctaTitle: Ready to plan your team day?
teambuilding.ctaText: Request a no-obligation quote, or get in touch for personal advice on the options.

boeken.heroSubtitle: View the available dates and select your preferred period. We will confirm your booking within 24 hours.

plattegrond.heroSubtitle: View the layout of the accommodation, the rooms and the grounds.

overOns.heroSubtitle: Get to know us and discover the story behind Orvelter Hof.
overOns.aboutText1: My name is Ruurd Doorten and since 1 January 2021 I have been the proud owner of Group Accommodation Orvelter Hof. After completing secondary school and hotel management school, I had the opportunity to do various interesting internships abroad, including Australia, Bali, Thailand, England and Belgium.
overOns.aboutText2: Upon returning home, the opportunity arose to take over Orvelter Hof and pursue my passion for hospitality and tourism.
overOns.aboutText3: I hope to welcome you at Orvelter Hof soon.
overOns.realisatieTitle: The creation of Group Accommodation Orvelter Hof
overOns.realisatieText1: In 2010 we were able to take over the former group accommodation Imkerhof. Our wish was to create a luxurious yet cosy and homely accommodation with plenty of privacy for our guests.
overOns.realisatieText2: All bedrooms are therefore equipped with their own bathroom, making it an accommodation suitable for family and friend groups as well as for meetings with overnight options and corporate outings.
overOns.realisatieText3: After a thorough renovation, with much of the work done ourselves, we were able to open our doors in 2012 under the name Orvelter Hof!

buffettenCatering.heroSubtitle: Let us take care of everything with delicious buffets, barbecue or a private chef. We are happy to arrange it for you.
buffettenCatering.introText1: If you would like to make things easy, we can arrange various buffets for you. We work together with local businesses for delicious freshly prepared catering.
buffettenCatering.introText2: In addition to the buffets, it is also possible to hire a private chef for a cooking workshop or an on-site dinner. Our chef specialises in Arabian, Indian and Syrian buffets.
buffettenCatering.aanbodSubtitle: All buffets are freshly prepared. Prices on request.
buffettenCatering.buffetOostersDesc: Nasi, bami & Babi Pangang. Satay skewers in sauce, meatballs in ketjap sauce, drumsticks and chicken in oriental sauce. Accompanied by sweet and sour, atjar tampoer & prawn crackers.
buffettenCatering.buffetStamppotDesc: 3 rotating stews: hutspot, sauerkraut & kale. Accompanied by smoked sausage, streaky bacon & meatball in gravy. Condiments: mustard, pickled onions, gherkins & piccalilli.
buffettenCatering.buffetItaliaansDesc: Fresh Italian macaroni & spaghetti, beef lasagne, free-range egg salad, pesto salad with mozzarella served with breadsticks and herb butter.
buffettenCatering.buffetBbqDesc: Selection of lamb chops, bratwurst, beef burger, kebab, pork chop, steak, spare ribs, pork tenderloin satay, streaky bacon & chicken satay. Accompanied by 3 types of salad, breadsticks, herb butter and 4 types of sauce. Vegetarian options available.
buffettenCatering.buffetThuisDesc: Dutch buffet with ham in sauce, chicken satay, roast pork in hunter's sauce, meatballs, nasi or bami and fried potatoes. With free-range egg salad, beef salad and raw vegetable salad, breadsticks and herb butter.
buffettenCatering.buffetThuisLuxeDesc: Home-style buffet extended with pork tenderloin in mushroom cream sauce and sirloin tips in Stroganoff sauce.
buffettenCatering.buffetArabischDesc: Freshly baked bread with spreads, Arabian lentil soup, Lebanese rice, oven-roasted potatoes, beef stew, marinated chicken, maghmour, oven-roasted vegetables, Fattoush salad & Babaganoush. With dessert.
buffettenCatering.buffetIndonesischDesc: Soto Ajam soup, nasi Koening, Rendang beef stew, Ajam smoor, Gado Gado, green beans sayur, Atjar & Pineapple, prawn crackers. With dessert.
buffettenCatering.ontbijtText: Start the day right with a delicious breakfast buffet featuring a wide variety of treats.
buffettenCatering.bbqText: Use of our barbecue including gas and cleaning.
buffettenCatering.kookworkshopText: Want something special? Hire a private chef for a cooking workshop or an on-site dinner. From Arabian to Indonesian — we make it possible.

ontbijtbuffet.heroSubtitle: Start the day right with a delicious breakfast buffet. Treat yourself while enjoying the view of the Drenthe landscape.
ontbijtbuffet.introText1: A weekend or midweek full of fun and activities naturally calls for a good breakfast. Want to treat yourself? Then book a delicious breakfast buffet with a wide variety of treats to start the day right.
ontbijtbuffet.introText2: We provide a varied buffet that has something for everyone. From fresh bread and croissants to scrambled eggs, fruit and yoghurt — everything to give your group an energetic start to the day.
ontbijtbuffet.highlightBroodText: Various types of bread, croissants and sweet pastries, freshly baked daily
ontbijtbuffet.highlightWarmText: Scrambled eggs, fried eggs, bacon and sausage for a hearty start
ontbijtbuffet.highlightFruitText: Fresh seasonal fruit, yoghurt, muesli and granola
ontbijtbuffet.highlightZuivelText: Cheese, cold cuts, jam, honey and various spreads
ontbijtbuffet.highlightKoffieText: Unlimited fresh coffee, tea, juice and water
ontbijtbuffet.highlightVerzorgdText: We set up, serve and clear away — you don't have to do a thing
ontbijtbuffet.ctaText: Indicate when booking that you would like to add the breakfast buffet, or contact us for more information.

arrangementen.arrangement1Desc: Enjoy a lovely circular walk in Witteveen or the Mantingerzand, through the forest, along the lake and through the meadows, and along the way enjoy a delicious picnic or a lovely cup of coffee with apple pie at restaurant Het Voschehuis in Mantinge.
arrangementen.arrangement2Desc: Stroll across the heath, country lanes and forests and find the right way using a GPS receiver. Getting lost is a thing of the past...
arrangementen.arrangement3Desc: You walk a set route with several small groups competing against each other. Each group receives 1 kloot (stone ball), and the goal is to take turns throwing the ball along the entire route. The group that crosses the finish line with the fewest throws wins.
arrangementen.arrangement4Title: Pitch and Putt Golf at Landal Orveltemarke
arrangementen.arrangement4Desc: A fun outing for the entire group. Enjoy a round of pitch and putt golf at Landal Orveltemarke, within walking distance of Orvelter Hof.
arrangementen.arrangement5Desc: Zoo Bizar is a mini-zoo, creatively set up in the barn of a traditional Saxon farmhouse in museum village Orvelte. It is the smallest zoo in the Netherlands and perhaps even in Europe! Various small (exotic) animal species can be admired in an original way.
arrangementen.arrangement5Price: Entrance with guided tour: € 4.50 p.p. (for groups of 20+)
arrangementen.arrangement6Desc: A day touring through Drenthe on a Solex. The wonderful feeling of freedom in the open air. There are many possibilities; together with you we can put together a great package.

zoekEnBoek.heroSubtitle: Select your preferred dates and number of guests. We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your booking.
zoekEnBoek.roomsSubtitle: All rooms are equipped with their own bathroom, comfortable beds, towels and bed linen. The rooms accommodate 2 to 4 guests.
zoekEnBoek.goedOmTeWeten1: Tourist tax: €2.85 per person per night

dagjeUit.heroSubtitle: Head out together, explore nature or discover a fun activity nearby.
dagjeUit.introText: Around Orvelter Hof everything is within reach for a wonderful day out. From peaceful forest walks and picturesque villages to exciting outings for children and active group activities. Whether you are staying with family or a larger group: Drenthe offers plenty of opportunities to explore together. Discover the area at your own pace and combine relaxation, adventure and good times — exactly as a day out should be.
dagjeUit.cat1Bullet1: Teambuilding & fun for young and old
dagjeUit.cat1Bullet2: Tailored for families, friends and teams
dagjeUit.cat2Bullet2: Fun and educational for all ages
dagjeUit.cat4Bullet2: Peace, space and stories from the past
dagjeUit.cat6Bullet2: A suitable venue for every taste

dagjeUitKinderen.heroOverline: For little explorers and big adventures
dagjeUitKinderen.heroSubtitle: Head out together, discover new places and make lasting memories.
dagjeUitKinderen.introText: Around Het Orvelter Hof there are plenty of fun, educational and adventurous outings for children of all ages. From playing and discovering animals to nature experiences and family-friendly attractions: everything is nearby and perfectly combined with a relaxed stay. Whether you want an afternoon out or a full day, Drenthe offers endless possibilities for a successful outing with the whole family. Peace, space and fun come together naturally here.
dagjeUitKinderen.activity1Bullet3: Playing and learning at the same time
dagjeUitKinderen.activity4Bullet1: Playing and tasting at the farm
dagjeUitKinderen.activity4Bullet2: Ice cream, local produce and activities
dagjeUitKinderen.zwembad3: Swimming pool De Peppel in Beilen
dagjeUitKinderen.zwembad4: Swimming pool De Boskamp in Westerbork

dagjeUitSportief.heroOverline: For those who love to be active
dagjeUitSportief.introText1: In the area around Het Orvelter Hof there are plenty of exciting and sporty activities to enjoy. For daredevils, fathers who want to be kids again and children who love to show what they can do, various active outings are within easy reach.
dagjeUitSportief.introText2: For special group activities we work together with <bold>JP Activiteiten</bold>. This provider offers a wide range of sports, games, brain teasers and action-based activities, suitable for groups of any composition and age.
dagjeUitSportief.activity1Desc: Enjoy a relaxed round of golf on the 9 or 18 hole Pitch & Putt course. The Pitch and Putt course is just 100 metres from Orvelter Hof. There is also an indoor playground for children.
dagjeUitSportief.activity2Desc: Discover Drenthe from a rental duck car and drive through the characteristic landscape at a relaxed pace. A unique and leisurely way to head out together, perfectly combined with other outings in the area.
dagjeUitSportief.activity2Bullet2: Unique tour past villages and nature

dagjeUitNatuur.introText1: Enjoy the great outdoors or trace the past? In Drenthe, peace, space and history come together in a unique way. The province is renowned for its vast natural areas and guarantees hours of cycling and walking pleasure.
dagjeUitNatuur.introText2: Discover the Dwingelderveld, the Orvelterzand, Mantingerzand or Sleenerzand, with the natural swimming lake De Kibbelkoele as a highlight. Boswachterij Elp with the idyllic Ieberenplas is also a wonderful spot to enjoy nature.
dagjeUitNatuur.introText3: In addition, Drenthe harbours a rich past, with the famous dolmens and many small, charming village greens. In museum village Orvelte you can experience bygone times and see how life used to be.
dagjeUitNatuur.highlight5Bullet2: Stories that touch and stay with you
dagjeUitNatuur.fietsroute1: Cycling route Orvelte and the forests of central Drenthe – 35 km
dagjeUitNatuur.fietsroute2: Cycling route Orvelte – 26 km or 46 km
dagjeUitNatuur.fietsroute3: Cycling route through the green heart of Drenthe – 37 km
dagjeUitNatuur.wandelroute2: Walking route Mantingerzand – 4 km, 4.5 km or 12 km
dagjeUitNatuur.wandelroute4: Walking route Scharreveld Westerbork – 4.5 km or 8.5 km

dagjeUitKunst.introText1: Drenthe and culture make a surprisingly strong combination. In the area around Het Orvelter Hof you will discover museums and cultural venues that bring the story of the region to life. From ancient history to modern themes and special collections.
dagjeUitKunst.introText2: Whether you are interested in archaeology, history, art or technology: there is always a cultural outing that matches your interests. Ideal for a relaxed day out or as a change of pace during your stay.
dagjeUitKunst.highlight4Bullet2: Life and work from the past
dagjeUitKunst.highlight5Bullet1: Work and life of Jan Kruis
dagjeUitKunst.highlight5Bullet2: Famous for Jan, Jans en de Kinderen

dagjeUitEten.introText1: After a day in nature or an active outing, it is wonderful to sit down at a good restaurant. In the area around Het Orvelter Hof you will find various dining options, from cosy village restaurants to brasseries and international cuisines.
dagjeUitEten.introText2: Whether you choose an extensive lunch, a relaxed dinner or a quick bite: there is always a place that matches your taste and company. Below you will find a selection of restaurants in the immediate area.

reviews.title: Rated 9.7 out of 10
reviews.subtitle: Our guests appreciate the tranquillity, comfort and personal service. Read their experiences on Zoover.
reviews.review1Text: The rooms with en-suite bathrooms are lovely. The communal area is a very pleasant space.
reviews.review2Text: A warm welcome with a top location. Nothing was too much for host Ruurd.
reviews.review3Title: Great house for a family weekend
reviews.review3Text: The house is spacious, well laid out, and every bedroom has its own bathroom.
reviews.review4Text: Super tidy, clean, fully equipped accommodation!
reviews.review5Text: Received very hospitably. Very friendly owner, truly had a fantastic time.
reviews.review6Text: The location is wonderful, beautifully set amidst nature. Plenty of space both indoors and outdoors.
